intro: The dark folds inward. Something vast uncoils where there should be nothing, and a voice older than light settles over you.
speaker: Giratina
introDialogue: So. A human wanders into my hollow.$How rare. How convenient.$I deal in what you cannot afford to give, and grant what you cannot bear to refuse.$Lay your treasures where I can see them, little thing. Choose.
title: The Bargain
description: A vast presence coils in the dark and offers a choice of cruel bargains. Every gift it grants has its price.

leave.label: Leave
leave.line1: Leaving? With your hands so full of things to lose?
leave.line2: The dark does not follow. It does not need to.
leave.line3: Come back when you have less.

greed.name: Greed
greed.tooltip:
(-) Empty a Pokémon's candy hoard
(+) A surge of money and a Greater Golden Ball
greed.offer: Pour out their sweetness, every grain. And watch your pockets overflow.
greed.result: Giratina drinks the sweetness from {{pokeName}}. Coins spill out of the dark and into your hands.

gluttony.name: Gluttony
gluttony.tooltip:
(-) Give up one Pokémon for the rest of the run
(+) A Legendary Egg
gluttony.offer: Feed me one. Whole. In its place I will leave you... potential.
gluttony.result: {{pokeName}} is drawn into the black and does not return. In your bag, an egg pulses with cold light.

pride.name: Pride
pride.tooltip:
(-) Dull a shiny Pokémon, losing its shine and Luck
(+) +30% to one stat you choose
pride.offer: That one shines so proudly. Let me take the light. The power beneath will more than repay it.
pride.result: The light leaves {{pokeName}}. Something heavier settles in its place.

wrath.name: Wrath
wrath.tooltip:
(-) Curse a random stat on one Pokémon
(+) Strengthen another Pokémon's best stat
wrath.offer: Wound the one to feed the other. Pain is only strength, moved to a better home.
wrath.result: A wound opens in {{pokeName}}. Its strength surfaces, screaming, in another.

envy.name: Envy
envy.tooltip:
(-) Strip all held items from a Pokémon (needs 3+)
(+) Choose a powerful relic
envy.offer: Strip it bare. What it clutched will buy you something far more interesting.
envy.result: {{pokeName}} is stripped bare. The dark lays out its relics, and waits for you to choose.

sloth.name: Sloth
sloth.tooltip:
(-) Two Pokémon drop to Lv 1 and lose all candy
(+) Covenant of Rest: full heal every 7 waves
sloth.offer: Why struggle so? Rest. I will see your weary ones mended, again and again. You need only fall... a little behind.
sloth.result: Two of yours are emptied to nothing. But the dark promises rest, again and again.

lust.name: Lust
lust.tooltip:
(-) Curse a random stat across your whole team
(+) A black-shiny reroll on one Pokémon
lust.offer: Let the wanting spread through them all. And one of yours will return... beautiful, and wrong.
lust.result: A craving taints the whole team. The chosen one returns wrong, and beautiful, wreathed in black.

outro: The presence withdraws, satisfied in a way you cannot name. The dark loosens its grip, and lets you pass.
